'''Radd Hardwikk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Clantaani]] who belonged to a [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] of criminals in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] led by [[Longo Two-Guns]]. He was wanted by [[Mos Eisley]] security forces for inciting a riot in the crowds of a [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] by handling and exploding [[Gorg/Legends|chubas]]. He was also suspected of other crimes such as illegal distribution of contraband and communication tools. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
